title: I baccanali di Tiberio
writer: Franco Castellano, Giuseppe Moccia, Mario Guerra
actors: Walter Chiari, Ugo Tognazzi, Abbe Lane
plot: Cassio, a tourist guide, and Primo, his bus driver, are taking a bus load of tourists to visit villa Jovis, at Capri island. Close to the Salto di Tiberio (Tiberius Fall...) they have an accident, and they knock their heads hard, ...
